emails.subject: Enron Net Works LLC
emails.body: Enron Net Works LLC Tana - Are there changes to the managers for the above entity? Current managers are Derrick, Haedicke and Whalley; with many business units removing Derrick and Whalley to comply with the marketing affiliate rule, I did not know if your entities would be subject to the same. Please let me know. Thanks. Lori Pinder Supervisor, Corporate Services and Assistant Secretary 1400 Smith St., Room 4802 Houston, Texas 77002 713.853-7291 713.646.8007 (Fax)

emails.subject: RE: Enron Net Works LLC
emails.body: I didn't think so, but I had to ask. Thanks! To: Pinder, Lori
